violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Quat sanitation bucket in back of the kitchen measured below acceptable levels at time of inspection.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop handle in ice -Scoop in sugar bin with handle down
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Table mounted can opener needs cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates were stored vertical throughout the kitchen and up front for salads.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Floor in kitchen missing tiles. -Walk in meat cooler wall has a hole at eye level with insulation exposed.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling of kitchen area in need of cleaning.
